title: Question: No "#pragma omp ..." lines in generated C++ code when using `--threads 2`?
body:
--- Author Name: **David Banas** (@capn-freako) Original Redmine Message: 2779 from https://www.veripool.org --- I just tried the _--threads_ option: @--threads 2@.
I was expecting to see some lines of the form: ``` #pragma omp ... ``` in the generated C++ code as a result, but didn't.
Was I expecting the wrong thing?
